title: Recover rich human docs and guidance from pack-driven state
summary: Review main-branch patterns and restore rich human-facing documentation and navigation without reintroducing hardcoded domain roots.
scope_items: Use main-branch quality patterns for richer machine-backed documentation and trackers where they fit the endstate
Reorganize or purge remaining legacy artifacts into proper final locations
done_when_items: Human-facing docs and rendered views are rich, aligned, and generated from pack-driven machine authority
Remaining legacy guidance or planning residue is either promoted, relocated, or removed
